minimal_change: Original TXT availability is checked before original-reference scoring.
Sample display names must render as stable Korean labels.
Run manifest job statuses must reflect the latest batch result.
Recreation candidates must declare at least two active information channels.
Task-level findings are stored separately from deduped system points.
Reports distinguish structural replay from fresh creative regeneration.
Original-reference evaluation needs a fixture path even when live source TXT files are missing.
Candidate artifacts and final manuscripts use different guard expectations.
Evaluation status is split into source, style, lexicon, guard, and overall fields.
Large-run reports show raw findings, deduped candidates, applied points, and pending queue.
